quotes.quote: The secret of getting ahead is getting started.
quotes.author: Mark Twain

quotes.quote: It does not matter how slowly you go as long as you do not stop.
quotes.author: Confucius

quotes.quote: Success is not final, failure is not fatal: it is the courage to continue that counts.
quotes.author: Winston Churchill

quotes.quote: The only way to do great work is to love what you do.
quotes.author: Steve Jobs

quotes.quote: In the middle of every difficulty lies opportunity.
quotes.author: Albert Einstein

quotes.quote: Believe you can and you're halfway there.
quotes.author: Theodore Roosevelt

quotes.quote: Life is what happens to you while you're busy making other plans.
quotes.author: John Lennon

quotes.quote: The greatest glory in living lies not in never falling, but in rising every time we fall.
quotes.author: Nelson Mandela

quotes.quote: You only live once, but if you do it right, once is enough.
quotes.author: Mae West

quotes.quote: Spread love everywhere you go. Let no one ever come to you without leaving happier.
quotes.author: Mother Teresa

quotes.quote: When you reach the end of your rope, tie a knot in it and hang on.
quotes.author: Franklin D. Roosevelt

quotes.quote: Always remember that you are absolutely unique. Just like everyone else.
quotes.author: Margaret Mead

quotes.quote: Do not go where the path may lead, go instead where there is no path and leave a trail.
quotes.author: Ralph Waldo Emerson

quotes.quote: You will face many defeats in life, but never let yourself be defeated.
quotes.author: Maya Angelou

quotes.quote: The future belongs to those who believe in the beauty of their dreams.
quotes.author: Eleanor Roosevelt

quotes.quote: It is during our darkest moments that we must focus to see the light.
quotes.author: Aristotle

quotes.quote: Whoever is happy will make others happy too.
quotes.author: Anne Frank

quotes.quote: Do not let the fear of striking out hold you back.
quotes.author: Babe Ruth

quotes.quote: You have brains in your head. You have feet in your shoes. You can steer yourself any direction you choose.
quotes.author: Dr. Seuss

quotes.quote: If life were predictable it would cease to be life and be without flavor.
quotes.author: Eleanor Roosevelt

quotes.quote: If you look at what you have in life, you'll always have more.
quotes.author: Oprah Winfrey

quotes.quote: Never let the fear of striking out keep you from playing the game.
quotes.author: Babe Ruth

quotes.quote: Money and success don't change people; they merely amplify what is already there.
quotes.author: Will Smith

quotes.quote: Your time is limited, so don't waste it living someone else's life.
quotes.author: Steve Jobs

quotes.quote: Not how long, but how well you have lived is the main thing.
quotes.author: Seneca

quotes.quote: If you're not stubborn, you'll give up on experiments too soon.
quotes.author: Jeff Bezos

quotes.quote: We must be willing to let go of the life we planned so as to have the life that is waiting for us.
quotes.author: Joseph Campbell

quotes.quote: You miss 100% of the shots you don't take.
quotes.author: Wayne Gretzky
